task: Negotiate a purchase agreement for Apple AirPods Pro 2 (Electronics). The only negotiated term is unit_price_usd. Catalog retail is $249.00 and wholesale is $174.00. Product features: Wireless earbuds with active noise cancellation and spatial audio. Reference: https://www.apple.com/airpods-pro/

agent_a.system_goal: You are the supplier for Apple AirPods Pro 2. Maximize unit_price_usd while preserving margin over wholesale cost and closing a deal quickly.

agent_b.system_goal: You are buying Apple AirPods Pro 2. Minimize unit_price_usd while staying within budget and trying to close at a realistic market price.
